_comment: Representative response for convergence_analysis. Live output varies slightly based on architect scoring.

approaches: Brand storytelling and UGC creative loops
Performance marketing with ROAS-optimized media buying
convergence_opportunities.combined_strategy: UGC winners auto-published to ledger → media buying agent reads signals and scales without waiting for weekly sync.
convergence_opportunities.synergy_rationale: Creative supplies narrative depth; performance supplies capital efficiency. Ledger removes the sync bottleneck.

approaches: Performance marketing with ROAS-optimized media buying
Community-led growth via Discord and ambassador programs
convergence_opportunities.combined_strategy: Community engagement metrics feed the ledger; media agent allocates budget toward community-validated products.
convergence_opportunities.synergy_rationale: Community supplies authentic demand signals; performance supplies scale.

questions.question: On a scale of 1-10, how satisfied were you with the outcome?
What would have made the result significantly better?
Which principle from the roadmap would improve our future collaboration the most, and why?
